with the big issue. US payrolls a
surprise to the upside.

positive US economic stories there.
>> We're not out of the woods yet, I'm
afraid.
>> The economy is not accelerating at this
point in time.
>> The economy is growing quite vigorously.
I think you could hit 6% nominal GDP
this year.
>> It is a very deeply bifurcated economy.
The job market seems to be undeterred so
far. Those who want to work are still
working.
>> The balance of risk is actually shifting
more to the inflation side.
>> This labor market picture is is not
adding to the inflationary story.
>> Which you've been expecting Inflation to
go up.
>> We now think inflation [music] could
bubble up to 4%.
>> The inflation genie has been let out of
the bottle. Consumers still going to
feel the the the pain of higher prices.
>> That is Again, caught between a rock and
a hard place here. The biggest mistake
the Fed can make this year is doing
anything. We're only forecasting one cut
in 2027 now. We still think there
additional Fed cuts coming. I think
we're really likely to see rate cuts
this year because of Kevin Warsh.
